=Index of module types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="ICSIG"| module type Icons.ICSIG >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="PAGE"| module type Page.PAGE >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The signature of the module to be given as parameter to the functor~.
>>
|
\\
